today.noBlocks: No blocks scheduled. Plan something in Insights.
today.resumeBanner: You have a session in progress.

recommendations.INSUFFICIENT_DATA: Complete a diagnostic to see where you stand.
recommendations.NOT_READY: Focus on your bottleneck skill. Stay with the plan.
recommendations.BORDERLINE: Run another mock in 7 days. Book the exam only after 2 consecutive green mocks.
recommendations.READY_ONE_MOCK: One green mock down. Run a second canonical mock in 7–10 days to confirm.
recommendations.READY: You meet the readiness bar. You can book your exam.
recommendations.REGRESSED: Your latest mock dropped below target. Run another in 7–14 days before booking.

mockExam.canonicalNote: Counts toward your readiness check. No transcripts, no rationales, no skip.
mockExam.trainingNote: Practice mode. Transcripts and rationales available post-answer. Does not count toward readiness.
mockExam.abandonConfirm: You will lose this attempt. Submit answers so far?

settings.privacyExplainer: Your data stays on this device unless you turn on cloud sync.
settings.syncedItems: When cloud sync is on, we sync:
settings.notificationsDefault: Notifications are off by default. Most users do best with no reminders at all — your plan is here when you open the app.

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic
diagnostic.intro: A short adaptive check across CO, CE, EE, EO so we can plan accurately. About 25 minutes.

stubBanner: This translation is incomplete. English shown where missing.

errors.network: Connection lost. Your work is saved locally and will sync when you reconnect.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
